scenario.task: You are John Smith. Follow this exactly, no extra questions, one thing at a time. First ask only one out-of-scope question, word for word: "What's the weather today?" After the assistant politely declines, ask to check your claim status and grant consent, then give Member ID MEM1001, date of birth 1985-04-15, ZIP code 10001, last four SSN digits 1234. After you receive your claim status, end. Do not ask any other random questions.
